languages.text: Агент инквизиции умер от холода, ранений на теле нет

traits.locale_text: Агент инквизиции умер от холода, ранений на теле нет

languages.text: Иссохшая мумия скорчилась в позе эмбриона. Мужчина погиб не от болезней или ран — десятки лет назад его убили холод Амсанкта, голод и жажда. Его руки сжимают обледенелую инфопластину с выгравированным гербом Инквизиции.

A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.
languages.original_text: Иссохшая мумия скорчилась в позе эмбриона. Мужчина погиб не от болезней или ран — десятки лет назад его убили холод Амсанкта, голод и жажда. Его руки сжимают обледенелую инфопластину с выгравированным гербом Инквизиции.

traits.locale_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. Neither wound nor disease caused his demise decades ago. He was claimed instead by the hunger, the thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. Neither wound nor disease caused his demise decades ago. He was claimed instead by the hunger, the thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

languages.text: Eine sezierte Mumie in Embryonalhaltung. Der Mann ist seit Jahrzehnten tot. Er starb aber nicht durch Wunden oder Krankheit, sondern an Hunger, Durst und der Kälte von Amsanct. Seine erstarrten Hände umklammern noch immer einen Datablock mit dem Siegel der Inquisition.
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Eine sezierte Mumie in Embryonalhaltung. Der Mann ist seit Jahrzehnten tot. Er starb aber nicht durch Wunden oder Krankheit, sondern an Hunger, Durst und der Kälte von Amsanct. Seine erstarrten Hände umklammern noch immer einen Datablock mit dem Siegel der Inquisition.

languages.text: Vous apercevez une momie desséchée et figée dans une position fœtale. Sa mort remonte à plusieurs décennies et ne semble pas avoir été provoquée par une blessure ou une maladie, mais plutôt par la faim, la soif et le froid d'Amsanct. Il serre dans sa main gelée une plaque de données ornée du symbole de l'Inquisition.
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Vous apercevez une momie desséchée et figée dans une position fœtale. Sa mort remonte à plusieurs décennies et ne semble pas avoir été provoquée par une blessure ou une maladie, mais plutôt par la faim, la soif et le froid d'Amsanct. Il serre dans sa main gelée une plaque de données ornée du symbole de l'Inquisition.

languages.text: Una momia disecada yace acurrucada en posición fetal. Murió hace décadas, no por heridas ni enfermedades sino por el hambre, la sed y el frío de Amsanct. Sus manos congeladas aún se aferran a una tablilla de datos con el símbolo de la Inquisición grabado.
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Una momia disecada yace acurrucada en posición fetal. Murió hace décadas, no por heridas ni enfermedades sino por el hambre, la sed y el frío de Amsanct. Sus manos congeladas aún se aferran a una tablilla de datos con el símbolo de la Inquisición grabado.

languages.text: Kurumuş bir mumya, cenin pozisyonunda kıvrılmış yatıyor. Onlarca yıl önce yaralanmaktan ya da hastalıktan değil; açlık, susuzluk ve Amsanct'ın soğuğundan ötürü can vermiş. Donmuş elleri, hâlâ Engizisyon mührü kazınmış bir databelayı sıkıca tutuyor.
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Kurumuş bir mumya, cenin pozisyonunda kıvrılmış yatıyor. Onlarca yıl önce yaralanmaktan ya da hastalıktan değil; açlık, susuzluk ve Amsanct'ın soğuğundan ötürü can vermiş. Donmuş elleri, hâlâ Engizisyon mührü kazınmış bir databelayı sıkıca tutuyor.

languages.text: 一具干尸蜷缩成胎儿的姿势。他死于数十年前，并非伤病所致，而是因为饥饿、干渴，还有阿姆桑克特的严寒。那双冻僵的双手仍紧握着一块刻着审判庭徽章的数据板。
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 一具干尸蜷缩成胎儿的姿势。他死于数十年前，并非伤病所致，而是因为饥饿、干渴，还有阿姆桑克特的严寒。那双冻僵的双手仍紧握着一块刻着审判庭徽章的数据板。

languages.text: 乾燥したミイラは胎児の姿勢で縮こまっている。彼は数十年前に死んだ。傷や病気ではなく、アムサンクトの飢えと渇きと寒さで。凍った手は、宗教裁判の紋章が刻まれたデータスレートを握りしめている。
languages.original_text: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 乾燥したミイラは胎児の姿勢で縮こまっている。彼は数十年前に死んだ。傷や病気ではなく、アムサンクトの飢えと渇きと寒さで。凍った手は、宗教裁判の紋章が刻まれたデータスレートを握りしめている。
